items.title: Boy arrested for attempted murder after two pupils stabbed at school
items.description: Counter-terror officers are leading the investigation after two boys were left seriously injured.

items.title: Has Keir Starmer Saved His Job (For Now)?
items.description: Keir Starmer survives his ‘moment of peril’ but what has it cost him and his government?

items.title: Ex-police chief said Trump told him in 2006 'everyone' knew of Epstein's behaviour
items.description: The now-president allegedly called police in Florida who were investigating Epstein and said "thank goodness you're stopping him".

items.title: Noel Clarke arrested on suspicion of attempted rape, reports say
items.description: The Doctor Who star was also held on suspicion of exposure and sexual assault by touching, the Sun reported.

items.title: Under-fire Trump commerce secretary confirms he visited Epstein's island
items.description: Howard Lutnick says he had lunch on the island in 2012, contradicting previous claims he had cut ties with Jeffrey Epstein in 2005.
